## Prediction: SpaceX stock seen rebounding after shedding roughly $1 trillion in market cap since IPO

The explicit ~$1T post-IPO drawdown framing quantifies the magnitude of the valuation reset and sets the context for the bull/bear debate crystallizing today across multiple SPCX stories; a credible rebound requires operational proof points not yet present in coverage.

- Opinion piece predicts SPCX will rebound after losing approximately $1 trillion in market cap post-IPO.
- Framed as a prediction with a named rationale, but no new operational catalyst cited.
- The ~$1 trillion post-IPO drawdown figure is stated in the headline itself.
- Coverage is bullish in tone but speculative in nature; single outlet.
